description_long: This object appears to be a crumpled, discarded garbage bag with a cylindrical, irregular shape and a partially collapsed structure. The exterior is predominantly white with splashes of purple and red, and there are visible printed markings or text on the surface, suggesting it may have once contained a branded product or packaging. The bag's material looks like thin, flexible plastic, and its surface is wrinkled and creased, indicating it has been handled or compressed. Both ends of the bag are visible, with one end appearing more open and the other more tightly closed, possibly by a heat seal or simple folding. The bag is moderately full, with some bulging and unevenness, but it is not overfilled or taut. It is shown lying on the ground, as if discarded in an urban environment.
description: A crumpled, white plastic garbage bag with purple and red markings, partially filled and lying on the ground with visible printed text.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bag's irregular, twisted shape and a mix of dark and light colors with visible creases.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the open or loosely closed mouth of the bag and more pronounced white and purple coloration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bag's flattened, wrinkled surface and the most visible area of printed text.
description_view_3: View of the other end, showing a more tightly closed or compressed section with a circular, darkened area.
attribute_fullness_or_bulging: moderately full with some bulging and unevenness
